headline: Pixar Needs Its Next Hit Franchise. Can Its Reluctant Leader Deliver?
summary: The ‘Toy Story’ studio used to print money for Disney but hasn’t made an original blockbuster in nearly a decade. Its top creative executive admits he’s made mistakes.
